personalInfo.name: R. Joseph Suvak, Jr., MSITM, MBA
personalInfo.title: QA & Software Engineering Lead
personalInfo.summary: QA and software engineering lead with deep full-stack experience across enterprise modernization, API delivery, and regulated healthcare systems. Proven success driving automation-first quality practices, improving defect prevention, and strengthening release readiness through structured test strategy, CI/CD quality gates, and cross-functional collaboration. Hands-on across Java, .NET, Node.js, Playwright, Jest, Selenium, SQL, and cloud-native delivery workflows.

items: Service to Service Communication (REST / SOAP / gRPC)

responsibilities: Develop AI-powered bot functionality and integrate it into the broader software platform.
Build and maintain full-stack functionality supporting platform workflows and user-facing capabilities.
Coordinate frontend, backend, API, and database changes required for platform integrations.
Develop and validate application functionality across multiple system layers.
Perform QA testing to identify defects, trace root causes, and implement fixes to stabilize system performance.
Established practical quality gates for new features, including regression, API, and integration validation before release.
Troubleshoot defects and production issues affecting application reliability, usability, and performance.
Work with stakeholders to define requirements, identify risks, and scope technical solutions.
Support quality improvements through structured testing, technical review, and issue resolution.
Implement tests into development workflow using Playwright and Jest.
Reverse-engineered COBOL mainframe systems and rebuilt them as Java REST APIs for phased migrations.
Re-architected the Client Relations system to normalize data flows and reduce duplication.
Re-wrote BED/FED infrastructure for NHSA reports to improve maintainability and reporting speed.
Adapted CI/CD packaging workflows for WebSphere/RAD deployments to standardize release processes.
Built dynamic indexed search functionality in legacy HTML4 pages using server-side Java logic.
Established Agile/Kanban processes, Jira templates, sprint metrics, and documentation standards.
Planned and scoped modernization and migration workloads with stakeholders.
Generated SQL extracts to diagnose production issues and support team re-scoping decisions.
Drove quality-focused release planning with structured validation criteria for high-risk migrations.
Delivered multiple cohorts in Full-Stack Web Development covering Node.js, Python Flask, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, and deployment pipelines.
Provided mentoring, feedback, and coaching to improve student understanding of software architecture and code quality.
Reviewed student test strategies and reinforced automation and quality-first engineering practices.
Led onboarding and cross-team collaboration efforts across patient application teams.
Built solutions in Ember.js, Vue.js, React, Node.js, Java/Spring, CSS, and SQL.
Created and expanded API functionality for patient portal services.
Wrote SQL triggers and refined queries to support user and facility data workflows.
Resolved DevOps build and compilation issues affecting local development and multi-team delivery.
Created ticket templates and technical documentation for development, QA, and product teams.
Aligned implementation plans with security and leadership stakeholders.
Partnered with QA and product owners to improve defect prevention and release quality outcomes.
Automated functional and regression tests for healthcare web applications using Selenium and API testing workflows.
Developed API test automation in Node.js/Jest and integrated pipelines with GitHub Actions (YAML).
Trained business analysts to create Agile-ready tickets and improve development intake efficiency.
Supported defect triage and quality reporting to help teams prioritize high-impact fixes.

projects.title: (Personal Consulting for Marketing Startup) GPT-4 Integrated Marketing Content
projects.description: Developed a GPT-4 powered content generation tool for a marketing startup, streamlining the content creation process.
highlights: Collaborated with marketing stakeholder to identify content needs and define project scope.
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs for real-time content generation and management.
Developed a comprehensive testing strategy to ensure API reliability and performance.
Created user authentication and authorization using AWS IAM for secure access to the content generation tool.
Set up serverless architecture using AWS Lambda and API Gateway to ensure scalability and cost-efficiency.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using AWS CodePipeline and CodeBuild for automated testing and deployment.
Set up monitoring and logging using AWS CloudWatch to track API usage and performance.
Set up token-based authentication and role-based access control for secure API usage.
Setup monitoring and logging using Google Cloud's operations suite to track API usage and performance.
Implemented containerization using Docker for microservices.
Deployed microservices on Google Cloud Platform.

projects.title: (Personal Consulting for Railway Startup) Microservices for Railway-specifiic Asset Tracking System
projects.description: Created the microservices architecture for a railway asset tracking system utilizing Python, Flask, and PostgreSQL.
highlights: Negotiated with stakeholders to gather requirements and define project scope.
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs for real-time asset tracking and management.
Developed a comprehensive testing strategy to ensure API reliability and performance.
Negotiated introductory pricing and managed deployment on multiple cloud platforms to determine cost-effectiveness.
Implemented containerization using Docker for microservices.
Deployed microservices on Google Cloud Platform.

projects.title: Mainframe Migration to Java-Based API
projects.description: Replaced COBOL-based system with modern API-driven architecture.
highlights: Redesigned legacy COBOL ETL into a Java API and nightly SQL-based ETL jobs tailored to individual business needs.
Introduced data sanitization and duplication detection for customer records.
Established direct integration between MMNA and Salesforce systems.

projects.title: Mobile Barcode Scanner – Coding for Caregivers
projects.description: As part of an internal cross-company project to reduce nurse workflow costs & performancethrough custom iOS-compatible barcode solution to update ServiceNow with asset information.
highlights: Built network device scanning prototype with UDP endpoint integration.
Project would achieve ~$19M in potential savings vs $1.3M implementation cost.

projects.title: Insurance Card Web Scraping
projects.description: AI-powered image parser to pre-fill patient insurance data.
highlights: Automated image parsing validation across 6 models using runtime scripts.
Aided in delivering solution 1 month ahead of schedule through enhanced coordination and collaboration.
